team.date_founded: Founded as the civic pride of Juno, the belt's most orderly and well-governed settlement.
team.badge: A balanced civic scale over a stylised city skyline.
team.home_kit: Royal purple and white with a clean geometric city-grid pattern.
team.away_kit: White with purple trim and a thin skyline silhouette.
team.history: Juno City are the belt's disciplinarians — a balanced, organised side that values structure and tactical order above all. They rarely beat themselves, and that, in the chaotic belt, is half the battle won.
team.club_culture: Orderly, civic-minded, and tactically disciplined. The Civics believe in doing things properly.
team.political_leaning: Belt civic-institutionalist — the belt's voice of law and order.
trophy_cabinet: A steady record built on consistency rather than flair
legends: Statute Vorn — the captain who embodied the club's disciplined order
achievements: Fewest cards and most disciplined record in the belt

stadium.date_built: Built as a civic monument at the heart of Juno's main settlement.
stadium.sponsors: Backed by the Junonian civic authority and trade halls.
stadium.pitch_type: Well-kept synthetic turf, true and even.
stadium.bio: The Temple is the belt's grandest civic venue — orderly, well-run, and quietly imposing. Visiting sides find a disciplined, knowledgeable crowd that punishes indiscipline with scorn.

training_facility.date_built: A well-organised standard complex run with civic efficiency.
training_facility.sponsors: Funded by the Junonian civic authority.
training_facility.bio: The Juno Temple Training Ground drills tactical organisation and positional discipline, turning out players who always know their job and rarely shirk it.

manager.appearance: Neat and precise, runs his sessions like a civic meeting.
manager.bio: Order Mensah is a balanced tactician obsessed with structure and discipline. His Juno sides are rarely spectacular but almost never careless, the most organised team in the belt.
manager.playing_history: A disciplined deep midfielder who rarely lost his position.
manager.playing_philosophy: Be balanced, be organised, and let the opponent make the mistakes. Order beats chaos.
achievements: Built the belt's most disciplined side

managing_staff.appearance: Studious and quiet, forever reviewing match footage.
managing_staff.bio: Lens Becker dissects every opponent on video, feeding Mensah the organised plans that keep the Civics one disciplined step ahead.
managing_staff.playing_history: Came to football through analysis, not play.
managing_staff.playing_philosophy: Order is built on information. Know them better than they know themselves.

players.appearance: Calm and orderly, a keeper for any plan.
players.bio: Civic Reyes is the balanced, reliable keeper who anchors the Civics' organised structure.

players.appearance: Tireless and disciplined, holds his position.
players.bio: District Torres is the workhorse full-back who never abandons his structural duty.
achievements: Most distance covered by a defender

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the organiser at the back.
players.bio: Metro Okafor is the team-first defender who keeps the Civics' lines immaculate.
Urban Kane is the aggressive defender who channels his fire within the structure.

players.appearance: Balanced and watchful, reads the game.
players.bio: Precinct Rivera is the composed defender who keeps the order when chaos beckons.

players.appearance: Inventive and tidy, the creative order.
players.bio: Boulevard Chen is the creative midfielder who finds chances without breaking the structure.
achievements: Most chances created in the side

players.appearance: Willing and selfless, the structural engine.
players.bio: Avenue Petrov is the team-first midfielder who holds the shape and does the running.
Plaza Morales is the steady midfielder who keeps the Civics ticking to plan.
achievements: Highest pass completion in the side

players.appearance: Sharp and self-assured, the orderly finisher.
players.bio: Skyline Yamamoto is the selfish striker who finishes the structured build-up with precision.

players.appearance: Direct and willing, the disciplined forward.
players.bio: Spire Nakamura is the aggressive forward who presses within the plan and stretches defences.
achievements: Most fouls won by a forward

players.appearance: Self-assured and sharp, the wide finisher.
players.bio: Apex Fischer is the selfish wide forward who turns the orderly build-up into goals.

players.appearance: Older and careful, the calm deputy keeper.
players.bio: Dome Tanaka is the cautious veteran second keeper, dependable when called.

players.appearance: Selfless and steady, the dependable squad defender.
players.bio: Sector Kim is the team-first deputy who keeps the structure intact in rotation.

players.appearance: Young and balanced, an academy defender on the rise.
players.bio: Level Osei is the promising young defender learning the Civics' disciplined order.

players.appearance: Inventive and raw, an academy playmaker in waiting.
players.bio: Grid Park is the creative deputy who offers a spark within the structure.

players.appearance: Lean and hungry, an academy striker with a selfish edge.
players.bio: Neon Beck is the eager young finisher pushing for a place in the orderly side.
